name: kiln-pottery
summary: A potter's workshop with a brick kiln against one wall, wheels at the working stations, and shelves of drying greenware. Clay dust, heat, and rows of finished pots.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle with the kiln along one short wall

primary_palette.note: classic potter's shop — kiln, one wheel, drying rack
production pottery — large kiln, bulk greenware

story_prompts: firing day — kiln roaring, potter refusing to let anyone near
wet-work morning — wheels spinning, three pots rising
cracked-batch disaster — shelf of broken greenware, potter weeping
glaze experiment — strange colored jars, alchemist in the corner

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: warm working light (0.4) with kiln glow dominant

anti_patterns: kiln against an exterior wall with implied chimney — never centerfloor
drying racks stay away from the kiln heat — opposite wall or middle zone
wheels need open floor around them — don't crowd them with shelves
